wpcs_compliance.analysis: Method name addIntegrityAttribute violates WordPress naming (should be add_integrity_attribute). Mixed brace style. No @access/@since in PHPDoc. Parameter names acceptable.

sql_safety.analysis: No SQL. Reads from in-memory array and option store.

security.analysis: esc_url() applied to URL before array_search(). However $known_hashes[$url] inserted directly into HTML without verifying the hash is set — undefined index risk and potentially unvalidated base64 content inserted as attribute value.

performance.analysis: array_search() is O(n). get_option() for known_hashes may be expensive on each request for plugins/themes with many assets. Consider in-memory caching.

wp_api_usage.analysis: esc_url() used correctly on URL. get_option() for hash store. String manipulation done with PHP stdlib functions.

code_quality.analysis: Potential undefined index at $known_hashes[$url]. Self-closing link detection via strpos is fragile. Manual HTML string position manipulation is brittle.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Depends on $this->sri_exclude and $known_hashes option. Missing defensive check for unset hash key.

i18n.analysis: No user-facing strings. HTML attribute builder.

accessibility.analysis: Adds integrity and crossorigin='anonymous' to script/link tags — required for SRI. Correct browser security implementation.

reasoning.key_observation: SRI attribute insertion with esc_url() but missing null check on $known_hashes[$url] and camelCase method name violating WPCS.

/**
 * Aruba HiSpeed Cache
 * php version 5.6
 *
 * @category Wordpress-plugin
 *
 * @author   Aruba Developer <hispeedcache.developer@aruba.it>
 * @license  https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html GPLv3
 *
 * @see     Null
 * @since    1.0.0
 *
 * @wordpress-plugin
 * Plugin Name:       Aruba HiSpeed Cache
 * Version:           2.0.19
 * Plugin URI:        https://hosting.aruba.it/wordpress.aspx
 *
 * @phpcs:ignore Generic.Files.LineLength.TooLong
 * Description:       Aruba HiSpeed Cache interfaces directly with the Aruba HiSpeed Cache service of the Aruba hosting platform and automates its management.
 * Author:            Aruba.it
 * Author URI:        https://www.aruba.it/
 * Text Domain:       aruba-hispeed-cache
 * Domain Path:       /languages
 * License:           GPL v3
 * Tested up to:      6.7
 * Requires PHP:      5.6
 * Requires at least: 5.4
 * This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
 * it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
 * the Free Software Foundation, either version 2 of the License, or
 * (at your option) any later version.
 *
 * This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
 * but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
 * MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
 * GNU General Public License for more details.
 *
 * You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
 * along with this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 *
 * @package ArubaHispeedCache
 */
function AHSC_get_version() {
    require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php';
    // Prevent early translation call by setting $translate to false.
    $plugin_data = get_plugin_data( __FILE__, false, /* $translate */ false );
    return $plugin_data['Version'];
}

accessibility.analysis: No HTML output in this singleton factory method. Returns a class instance with no rendering side effects.
